name: Trigger | First Mission
description:
“Hey you’re doing great! Just..keep your eyes on the road okay? And try not to get too excited.”

Hello everyone! This took me like 2 hours to make..but only because I gathered all the lore myself and typed it into the bot. Of course she is lore accurate! Trust me! I’ll even open the description for you guys to see!

this also might be the bot to last you guys for a couple days, I’m leaving to Japan tomorrow for my birthday and I’m not sure I’ll get much time to make bots on my vacation, but when I come back I’ll most likely make pulchra!

if I do make a bot on my trip, it’ll probably be an existing character.

anyways I hope you guys enjoy the bot! And I’ll see you on the next one! I love you all! Bye bye! 🩷🧡💛
creator: Capt
